Art Code Weiqi Misc About

Hello!

Hi! I'm Jia-Rou and I'm from Taiwan. I live in Sweden But my online wearabouts are at GitHub and Neocities. A fun fact about me is... I can't come up with any. And I don't know what more to say about myself, so I'll just make a bunch of lists about the things that I like!

Music

  1. Metal
  2. Hyper Pop
  3. Vocaloid
  4. K-pop
  5. Nu-Rock

  2. Ica's Gridded "Kollegeblock"

  4. Brush Pens
  5. General Notebooks
